description: Structured output from deploy and verification phase of implement-issue workflow

status.description: Overall status of deployment and verification

deployment_target.description: The target environment where the code was deployed (e.g., staging, production, local)

health_status.description: Status of the deployed application health checks

verification_results.description: Results from verification tests and checks

acceptance_criteria_met.description: Whether all acceptance criteria are satisfied

issues.description: Array of any issues encountered during deployment or verification

summary.description: High-level summary of the deployment and verification results
